esp32_btserial_begin.message0: Initialize Bluetooth serial port device name %1
esp32_btserial_begin.tooltip: Initialize the classic Bluetooth serial port and set the Bluetooth device name

esp32_btserial_available.message0: The Bluetooth serial port has data to read
esp32_btserial_available.tooltip: Check whether there is data readable on the Bluetooth serial port

esp32_btserial_read_string.tooltip: Read string from Bluetooth serial port

esp32_btserial_read_byte.message0: Bluetooth serial port reads a byte
esp32_btserial_read_byte.tooltip: Read a byte from the Bluetooth serial port

esp32_btserial_println.message0: Bluetooth serial port sends %1 line feed
esp32_btserial_println.tooltip: Send data through Bluetooth serial port and wrap

esp32_btserial_print.tooltip: Send data via Bluetooth serial port

esp32_btserial_write.tooltip: Write a single byte via Bluetooth serial port

esp32_btserial_connected.tooltip: Check whether the Bluetooth serial port is connected

esp32_btserial_has_client.message0: The Bluetooth serial port has a client connection
esp32_btserial_has_client.tooltip: Check if there is a Bluetooth client connected

esp32_btserial_disconnect.message0: Disconnect the Bluetooth serial port connection
esp32_btserial_disconnect.tooltip: Disconnect the current Bluetooth serial port connection

esp32_btserial_get_address.tooltip: Get the MAC address string of the Bluetooth device
